Table 5: Unified evaluation across medical reasoning benchmarks. Accuracy (%) is reported. Within Baseline Models and Our Model segment, bold highlights the best scores, and underlines indicate the second-best. HM-W and HM-T are short for HiMed-West and HiMed-Trad respectively. ”w/o” and ”w/” denote ”without” and ”with”.
